name: ReasonType
description: An absence reason type (e.g., vacation, sick leave, parental leave).

_id.description: Unique identifier of the reason type.

name.description: Display name of the absence reason.

color.description: Color code for displaying this absence type in the calendar.

requiresApproval.description: Whether absences of this type require manager approval.

affectsAllowance.description: Whether absences of this type count against the employee's allowance.
